content.title: 2025 Pet Insurance Star Ratings and Awards

awards: 2025 Outstanding Value Award – Pet Insurance with Routine Care
medibank_awards.description: Drawing on the heritage of a major Australian health brand, Medibank Pet Insurance delivers policies that tend towards high-percentage reimbursement rates. Its cover is notable for not including restrictive sub-limits and for providing clear and comprehensive financial protection for a wide range of veterinary procedures. This design offers policyholders a significant level of assurance when making important decisions about their pet’s care. Medibank is receiving the Routine Care award for the second consecutive year.
